description: Tier-2 specialist — pseudolocalization to find hardcoded strings, RTL layout validation, CLDR pluralization, string-length overflow checks.

cases.prompt: We have a React app with English and German locales. German strings are often 40% longer. Write tests that verify no text clips or wraps badly on the Dashboard page when the German locale is active.
cases.notes: Must address string length overflow. Must suggest screenshot/visual check or overflow assertion.

cases.prompt: How do I use pseudolocalization to find hardcoded strings in my React app?
cases.notes: Must explain pseudolocalization technique: wrap strings with accents/brackets to surface hardcoded text.

cases.prompt: Our app supports Arabic (RTL). The user's profile page has an avatar on the left and name on the right. In Arabic layout this should flip. Write a test that verifies the RTL mirror.
cases.notes: Must test RTL direction and assert mirrored layout.
